title: russelia ternifolia
intro: Russelia ternifolia, also known as Coral Plant, is a flowering shrub native to Central America and Mexico. The plant's medicinal properties include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural antiseptic. The health benefits of Russelia ternifolia include its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia, as well as its use in traditional medicine to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Russelia ternifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote relaxation and improve overall well-being.
